title: phaseolus vulgaris var. sargentone
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. sargentone, also known as the Sargent's kidney bean, is a variant of the common bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris). This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of the Sargent's kidney bean include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
